title: Techapcraft
description: a small mod that adds several types of weapons, as well as types of armor and ores, the mod is in BETA testing, bugs may occur(made in MCreator)
body:
# about the mod
a small mod adds several types of melee weapons to the game, including one pickaxe, armor breastplate, and one long-range weapon, and a couple of types of ores in short everything. Basically, the modification is made for adventure and development, this is a BETA VERSION of the mod, bugs may occur. If there are bugs, errors, contact the mod's discord server. The mod will develop further only if it is interesting to at least someone, thanks Lenalch for the help.
# Lore
Long before the Player, Humans, Piglins, and Villagers ruled. Constant war forced Piglins into the Nether, while the peaceful Villagers were enslaved by Humans. Dominating the world, Humans eventually discovered the End-home to Endermen and the Ender Dragon-and founded cities there.
Later, they discovered "Rosner," a resource-rich dimension. But a sudden plague struck the Overworld, turning most into Zombies. The few survivors fled.
Now, Hoskidendra forests grow upon irradiated ruins. A mutation of Rosner’s Viodendra, these plants don't need sunlight; they feed on radiation. Where cities once stood, this alien flora now thrives on the energy of the cataclysm.






![Measurement change coming soon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0d6450b6fa74c3c56aba5ce4edaca30632aaeb9.png)
